description_long: This object is a classic dumbbell with a straight cylindrical handle connecting two sets of round, stacked weight plates on either end. The handle appears to be made of metal, likely steel, and is smooth and dark in color, suggesting a powder-coated or painted finish. Each end features multiple circular plates, giving the dumbbell a robust and balanced appearance, with the plates tightly fitted and flush against each other. The end caps are flat and round, matching the diameter of the outermost plates, and there are no visible bolts, screws, or collars securing the plates, indicating a fixed-weight design. The overall color scheme is a dark gray to black, with subtle highlights suggesting a metallic sheen. There are no visible logos, weight markings, or signs of wear, giving the dumbbell a clean, new look.
description: A dark gray, round-ended dumbbell with a smooth cylindrical handle and stacked circular weight plates, appearing new and unused.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular end cap and stacked round plates, with the handle axis pointing away.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the handle and both sets of stacked round plates on either end.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite circular end cap and plate arrangement.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, highlighting the handle and symmetrical plate stacks.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, round cross-section, smooth surface, no visible knurling or ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Flat, round end caps matching the diameter of the outermost plates, metallic with a smooth finish and no visible patterns.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or rust.
